message:
fix(palette): use double-Enter submission protocol to match `ntm send`

The palette was using SendKeysForAgent with a single Enter + 100ms delay,
which typed text into agent panes but never submitted it. Extract the
double-Enter logic (text, 1s pause, Enter, 500ms pause, Enter) into a
shared tmux.SendKeysForAgentDoubleEnter function used by both the palette
and CLI send command.

Fixes #94

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
